title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.837 - Officer Daniel Vasquez memorial highway designated for portion of State Highway 210 in Clay County
text:
227.837.  Officer Daniel Vasquez memorial highway designated for portion of State Highway 210 in Clay County. — The portion of State Highway 210 from CST Diamond Parkway continuing east to CST Chouteau Trafficway in Clay County shall be designated as "Officer Daniel Vasquez Memorial Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2023 S.B. 127)
